scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix DoubtDeskBackend run dev" "npm --prefix ddfrontend/my-project run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix ddfrontend/my-project install && npm --prefix ddfrontend/my-project run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix DoubtDeskBackend install && npm --prefix ddfrontend/my-project install
